content:
# NAFNet Post-Grading Denoiser POC Results (2026-04-01)

## Setup
- Model: NAFNet-SIDD-width32 (ECCV 2022), 29.16M params, 111.2 MB
- Architecture: UNet with NAFBlocks (no nonlinear activations), width=32, enc=[2,2,4,8], middle=12, dec=[2,2,2,2]
- Trained on SIDD real noise dataset, NOT underwater-specific
- Applied as post-processing after RAUNE-Net + depth-aware grading
- CPU inference: ~3.6s/frame at 1024x576

## Results

### Ambiance+Depth → NAFNet
| Metric | Before DN | After DN | Change |
|--------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Noise (laplacian) | +44.7% | **-36.3%** | **-81pp** |
| R/G ratio | 0.880 | 0.885 | +0.006 (preserved) |
| Saturation | 0.284 | 0.277 | -0.007 (minimal loss) |
| White clip | 0.22% | 0.11% | halved |
| Laplacian std | 12.9 | 5.7 | **-56% reduction** |

### LAB+Depth → NAFNet
| Metric | Before DN | After DN | Change |
|--------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Noise (laplacian) | +25.7% | **-47.9%** | **-74pp** |
| R/G ratio | 0.931 | 0.934 | +0.004 (preserved) |
| Saturation | 0.272 | 0.267 | -0.005 (minimal loss) |
| White clip | 1.22% | 1.07% | slight reduction |
| Laplacian std | 11.2 | 4.7 | **-58% reduction** |

## Key Findings
1. **Massive noise reduction**: 55-58% laplacian std reduction. Noise goes from amplified (+25-45%) to BELOW original levels (-36 to -48%).
2. **Color preserved**: R/G ratio actually slightly improves (+0.004-0.006). NAFNet doesn't shift color.
3. **Saturation barely affected**: Only -0.005 to -0.007 loss. Acceptable.
4. **Clipping reduced**: Both white and black clipping decrease slightly.
5. **Clean visual output**: Smoother water background, preserved subject detail, no visible artifacts.
6. **General-purpose works fine**: Despite being trained on SIDD (phone camera noise), it effectively denoises the processing-introduced noise from grading operations. The noise from contrast/saturation amplification has similar statistical properties to sensor noise.

## Recommended Pipeline
RAUNE-Net → Depth-aware ambiance grading → NAFNet denoise

Total pipeline on CPU: ~7.5s (RAUNE) + 0.2s (grade) + 3.6s (denoise) = ~11.3s/frame
On GPU (estimated): ~0.5s + 0.2s + ~0.3s = ~1.0s/frame

## Scripts & Artifacts
- Script: working/sea_thru_poc/run_nafnet_denoise.py
- Results: working/sea_thru_poc/results/{01,02,03}_raune_{amb,lab}_depth_dn.png
- Model: working/sea_thru_poc/models/NAFNet/experiments/pretrained_models/NAFNet-SIDD-width32.pth
